item.title:
Palestine_UN: Thomas Niblock reposteó State of Palestine @Palestine_UN · 12h Hebron, Palestine
Pietro Masturzo Cita L'Espresso @espr
item.description:
Thomas Niblock reposteó State of Palestine @Palestine_UN · 12h Hebron, Palestine
Pietro Masturzo Cita L'Espresso @espressonline · 16h Traducido del italiano La anexión de Cisjordania, con soldados cómplices de los colonos. Gaza aniquilada. El avance en Líbano. La frontera violada en Siria. La guerra contra Irán. Limpieza étnica y masacres. Así la derecha sionista da forma al Gran Israel
El número de L’Espresso, en quioscos y en la 258 8 mil 47 mil 1 M

item.title: CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 4h This is the game-defining kickout I keep talking about. Highlighted the numbers to illu
item.description: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 4h This is the game-defining kickout I keep talking about. Highlighted the numbers to illustrate the point. Armagh could so easily have stepped off it a man light. Pressed up, really organised, talking, everyone sure of their job against Tyrone’s bunch & break routine. Massive. 1 37 7 mil

item.title:
CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 5h “It wasn’t sitting well with them, getting some of the criticism we were getting.”
Tyr
item.description:
Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 5h “It wasn’t sitting well with them, getting some of the criticism we were getting.”
Tyrone boss Malachy O’Rourke speaks about the critics and their struggle to get hands on the ball in extra-time after the game yesterday 8 5 mil

item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 5h With several promising @Galway_GAA players emerging, Darren Morrissey is looking forward to th
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 5h With several promising @Galway_GAA players emerging, Darren Morrissey is looking forward to the @gaaleinster SHC gaa.ie Darren Morrissey excited about emerging Galway talent Click here to listen to the full interview with Galway senior hurling captain Darren Morrissey. By Cian O'Connell With a new wave of talent emerging, these are encouraging times for Galway. A... 1 2 5 mil
